_comment: Generated by tools/body_proxy_build.gd. Sparse CPU delta library for the EYE/TEETH/TONGUE/GENITAL proxy pieces, keyed by GLOBAL proxy render-vertex index. DO NOT hand-edit; regenerate with `nix build .#body-proxies`.
